use_codes.desc: ADJUNCT TO DIET AND EXERCISE TO IMPROVE GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN PATIENTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES WHO ARE ALREADY TREATED WITH A PIOGLITAZONE AND METFORMIN

AN ADJUNCT TO DIET AND EXERCISE TO IMPROVE GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN ADULTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS WHO ARE ALREADY TREATED WITH A THIAZOLIDINEDIONE (TZD) AND METFORMIN OR WHO HAVE INADEQUATE GLYCEMIC CONTROL ON A TZD OR METFORMIN ALONE
